nodes.text: Another one? Tell my tribe I'm sorry. I failed them.
I came looking for the Crown of Endless Riches. A fool's dream.
It's real, you know. The Crown. I saw it. But the Guardian blocks the way.
I've been trapped here since the cave-in. The passage behind me leads to the Crown Chamber, but the Guardian won't let me pass.
The Crystal Lens... you have it? Zog's old trinket. Point it at the shrine symbols in the chamber. It reveals the Guardian's weakness.
Take the Crystal Lens to the Crown Chamber. Read the symbols on the wall. The Guardian fears the light.
You did it. You defeated the Guardian.
The Crown... it's beautiful. But it's not about gold, is it? It's about what we're willing to do for each other.
Take me home, Grub. It's time I saw my people again.
